title: L'amore difficile
director: Alberto Bonucci, Luciano Lucignani, Nino Manfredi
writer: Italo Calvino, Fabio Carpi, Sandro Continenza
actors: Enrico Maria Salerno, Catherine Spaak, Claudia Mori
plot: A journalist could marry the daughter of a tycoon, but prefers a married woman. An attorney renounces her lover by greed. A soldier tries to approach a widow on a train. A German couple looking for adventure aim for the wrong target.
